title: Collaboration Status Bar
description: Configuration for the collaboration status bar component that displays active collaborators, connection status, and synchronization metrics for real-time collaborative editing sessions.

showUserCount.title: Show User Count
showUserCount.description: Display the total number of active collaborators in the status bar

showConnectionStatus.title: Show Connection Status
showConnectionStatus.description: Display real-time connection status indicator with connection health metrics

showSessionId.title: Show Session ID
showSessionId.description: Display the collaborative session identifier for troubleshooting and session management

maxDisplayedUsers.title: Maximum Displayed Users
maxDisplayedUsers.description: Maximum number of user avatars to display individually before showing overflow count

compactMode.title: Compact Mode
compactMode.description: Enable compact display mode for smaller screens or minimal interface preference

showOptionsMenu.title: Show Options Menu
showOptionsMenu.description: Display the collaboration options menu button for accessing sharing, permissions, and settings

showUserAvatars.title: Show User Avatars
showUserAvatars.description: Display individual user avatars with presence indicators for active collaborators

showUserNames.title: Show User Names
showUserNames.description: Display usernames alongside or instead of avatars in the user list

avatarSize.title: Avatar Size
avatarSize.description: Size of user avatars in pixels for presence indicators

updateInterval.title: Status Update Interval
updateInterval.description: Time in milliseconds between status bar updates for connection health and user presence

showConnectionQuality.title: Show Connection Quality
showConnectionQuality.description: Display connection quality indicators (good, poor) alongside connection status

showLastSyncTime.title: Show Last Sync Time
showLastSyncTime.description: Display timestamp of the last successful synchronization with the server

showCollaborationMetrics.title: Show Collaboration Metrics
showCollaborationMetrics.description: Display collaboration statistics such as active editing sessions and recent changes

alertOnDisconnection.title: Alert on Disconnection
alertOnDisconnection.description: Show visual alerts when connection to the collaboration server is lost

showReconnectButton.title: Show Reconnect Button
showReconnectButton.description: Display a manual reconnect button when connection is lost

positionInStatusBar.title: Position in Status Bar
positionInStatusBar.description: Position of the collaboration status bar component within the bottom status bar

showActiveCell.title: Show Active Cell
showActiveCell.description: Display which cell each collaborator is currently editing

showUserActivity.title: Show User Activity
showUserActivity.description: Display activity indicators for users (typing, idle, active)

hideInactiveUsers.title: Hide Inactive Users
hideInactiveUsers.description: Hide users who have been inactive for the configured timeout period

inactivityTimeout.title: Inactivity Timeout
inactivityTimeout.description: Time in seconds after which inactive users are considered disconnected

showSessionUptime.title: Show Session Uptime
showSessionUptime.description: Display how long the current collaboration session has been active

enableStatusBarTooltips.title: Enable Status Bar Tooltips
enableStatusBarTooltips.description: Show detailed tooltips when hovering over status bar elements

showPermissionLevel.title: Show Permission Level
showPermissionLevel.description: Display the current user's permission level (view, edit, admin) in the status bar

enableQuickActions.title: Enable Quick Actions
enableQuickActions.description: Show quick action buttons for common collaboration tasks (share, lock, comment)

animatePresenceChanges.title: Animate Presence Changes
animatePresenceChanges.description: Enable smooth animations when users join, leave, or change activity status

showNetworkLatency.title: Show Network Latency
showNetworkLatency.description: Display network latency metrics for collaboration synchronization

colorScheme.title: Color Scheme
colorScheme.description: Color scheme for user presence indicators and status elements

showDocumentSyncStatus.title: Show Document Sync Status
showDocumentSyncStatus.description: Display synchronization status for the current document (synced, syncing, conflict)

enableClickToFocus.title: Enable Click to Focus
enableClickToFocus.description: Allow clicking on user avatars to focus on their current editing location

showChangeCount.title: Show Change Count
showChangeCount.description: Display the number of changes made in the current collaboration session

enableMobileOptimization.title: Enable Mobile Optimization
enableMobileOptimization.description: Optimize status bar layout and interactions for mobile devices
